basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Mangalagiri Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for Project Staff Posts
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Mangalagiri
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Mangalagiri (AIIMS Mangalagiri) has released the official Project Staff Recruitment Notification 2026 for Doctor and Nurse posts. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced under this recruitment drive. Eligible candidates with an MBBS degree (with Medical Council registration) or B.Sc Nursing qualification, and a maximum age of 40 years, can attend the walkin interview on 30 July 2026. The official notification PDF and walkin interview details are available below.

age_limit.age_details: Maximum age limit is 40 years for both posts.
age_limit.details: Doctor: Maximum age limit is 40 years. Upper age limit may be relaxed as per Govt. of India rules. Nurse: Maximum age limit is 40 years. Upper age limit may be relaxed as per Govt. of India rules.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS Degree with Medical Council registration for Doctor, BSc Nursing for Nurse.
qualification.details: Doctor: MBBS Degree from the recognized University with registration Medical Council of India. Experience in Palliative care (Preferable) Nurse: BSc Nursing. Experience in relevant field. Fluent in Regional Language (Telugu)

selection_process: Interview Written tests may be conducted if the number of candidates applied is more.

all_official_links.label: Download AIIMS Mangalagiri Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Mangalagiri Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the AIIMS Mangalagiri Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download AIIMS Mangalagiri Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Mangalagiri Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Doctor: MBBS Degree from the recognized University with registration Medical Council of India. Experience in Palliative care (Preferable) Nurse: BSc Nursing. Experience in relevant field. Fluent in Regional Language (Telugu)

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Mangalagiri Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Doctor: Maximum age limit is 40 years. Upper age limit may be relaxed as per Govt. of India rules. Nurse: Maximum age limit is 40 years. Upper age limit may be relaxed as per Govt. of India rules.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Mangalagiri Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Interview Written tests may be conducted if the number of candidates applied is more.

content_sections.heading: Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for AIIMS Mangalagiri Various Posts Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for AIIMS Mangalagiri Project Staff recruitment?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Project Staff positions at AIIMS Mangalagiri is scheduled for 30th July 2026. Candidates are advised to reach the venue on time.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Doctor post?
faq.answer: For the Doctor position, candidates must possess an MBBS Degree from a recognized University with registration from the Medical Council of India. Experience in Palliative care is preferable.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification for the Nurse post?
faq.answer: The required qualification for the Nurse post is a BSc Nursing degree. Additionally, candidates should have experience in a relevant field and be fluent in the regional language (Telugu).

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Project Staff positions?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for both the Doctor and Nurse positions is 40 years. Age relaxation may be applicable as per Government of India rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Doctor and Nurse posts?
faq.answer: The selected Doctor will receive a salary of Rs. 75,000 per month, while the selected Nurse will be paid Rs. 30,000 per month. The contract duration is 6 months, extendable.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for Project Staff at AIIMS Mangalagiri?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for Project Staff at AIIMS Mangalagiri, with one post for a Doctor and one post for a Nurse.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these positions?
faq.answer: The selection process will primarily involve an interview. However, written tests may be conducted if a large number of candidates apply for the positions.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should candidates bring for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must bring their CV, original testimonials, a set of photocopies, proof of age (SSC Certificate/Class 10 or matriculation Certificate), academic qualification certificates, 2 passport size photos, valid ID proof (Aadhar/PAN/Passport/Voter ID), and an updated CV.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive. Candidates can attend the walk-in interview without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the walk-in interview scheduled to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at the AIIMS Mangalagiri office. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for the exact venue address and reporting time.

faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Project Staff positions at AIIMS Mangalagiri is scheduled for 30th July 2026. Candidates are advised to reach the venue on time.
